_comment: Copy entries from mcpServers below into .mcp.json and set the referenced env vars to enable. Remove the underscore-comment keys once copied.

granola._comment: Granola meeting transcripts. Used by /connect-transcripts and /transcript-sync. Requires Granola desktop app installed (reads local Supabase creds).

gmail._comment: Gmail. Used by /morning-brief and /capture-voice (auto-harvest writing samples from Sent folder).

google-calendar._comment: Google Calendar. Used by /morning-brief and /meeting-prep (pull today's events and attendee context).
